subject: Will — Johto Elite Four trainer, identified by card name; masked figure with light pink hair in a red jacket, theatrical pose
description: A masked trainer figure stands in a geometric interior space with angular purple and blue architectural elements in the background. The figure wears a distinctive purple mask covering the upper half of their face, has long flowing light pink hair, and is dressed in a crimson red jacket over a lighter undershirt. One hand is raised in a theatrical, presentational gesture with an open empty hand — no prop or weapon visible. The posture leans slightly forward, projecting dramatic confidence. The lighting is cool and somewhat dramatic. The overall mood is theatrical and mysterious.
foreground: Masked trainer with light pink hair in a crimson jacket, one hand raised in empty-handed theatrical gesture
background: Geometric angular interior space with purple and blue tones
emotion: theatrical, dramatic, mysterious — slightly forward lean with raised empty hand
